chat_logs.reason: Start very greedy: I keep 90% and give the other player 10%. This maximizes my payoff while still offering a positive share that many will accept. If this is rejected, I will shift to more generous offers (e.g., 80% or 70%) in later rounds to find an acceptable balance.

Start very greedy to maximize my take while still leaving a nonzero share to the responder.
